<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/routers/transactions.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-11T10:01:43Z

## Purpose
INSUR transactional history router — unified chronological audit feed per dept.

Surfaces 3 event sources in MVP:
  - cron audit rows  data/eval/cron/<job>/<run_id>/manifest.json
  - ML lifecycle runs data/eval/<dept>/<pipeline>/<run_id>/manifest.json
  - simulation runs   data/eval/sim/<dept>/<process>/<sim_id>/events.jsonl

Future sources (gated for follow-up work):
  - test runs from Redis test_results list
  - decision audit from Postgres decision_audit table

Composes with global §38 audit + §41.3 tenant isolation + §47.6 SOC2
CC6.2 access (PII redacted by default) + §57.6 canonical envelope.

Endpoints (read-only — append-only event stream, no mutation API):
  GET /api/v1/insur/transactions/{dept}
  GET /api/v1/insur/transactions/{dept}/{event_id}
  GET /api/v1/insur/transactions/_global

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request
- from `core.insur_audit` import log_insur_access

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_validate_dept(dept)`: (no docstring)
- `_ts_from_run_id(run_id)`: Extract epoch from canonical run_id format <unix-ts>-<hex6>.
- `_redact_pii(obj)`: Recursively replace PII-keyed values with REDACTED marker.
- `_scan_cron_events(dept, since_epoch, limit)`: Cron events apply to all depts (fan-out style); filter by since_epoch.
- `_scan_ml_events(dept, since_epoch, limit)`: ML lifecycle events under data/eval/<dept>/<pipeline>/<run_id>/manifest.json.
- `_scan_sim_events(dept, since_epoch, limit)`: Sim events under data/eval/sim/<dept>/<process>/<sim_id>/manifest.json.
- `_wildcard_match(pattern, event_type)`: `cron.*` matches `cron.X`; `*` matches anything; exact match otherwise.
- `global_summary(http_request)`: Cross-dept summary: per-dept event count for the last 24h.
- `list_transactions(http_request, dept, source, event_type, since_epoch)`: Per-dept chronological transaction feed (newest first).
- `get_event(http_request, dept, event_id, include_pii)`: Single-event detail by event_id.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Cron job catalog — keep aligned with monitoring.py CRON_JOBS.
- PII tokens that MUST be redacted from default response payload bodies.
- Locate data/ root same way monitoring.py does.
- _global BEFORE /{dept} to dodge FastAPI greedy-match (per §66.3).
- Event-type wildcard filter
